name: W4 KB Morning Flow (Saturday)
description: 10 min KB-specific prep. Light and flowing — end of a big GTC week. Open the thoracic spine for bent press, activate hips for TGU and lunges, and get the shoulder ready for overhead work.

exercises.notes: 30s each side. Thoracic rotation for bent press and windmill. Go deeper than earlier in the week.
Slow and deliberate. Full spinal wave.
Chest toward floor, arms extended. Shoulder + lat opener for all the overhead work ahead.
30s each side. TGU and overhead lunges both need open hips.
Bodyweight. Groove the pattern before you load it with a bell. Heels down, chest up.
Low lunge + twist. Hip flexors and thoracic. Primes overhead lunge.

tips: 10 min — end of GTC week, keep it light and loose.
Cossack squat in the warmup: bodyweight first, then load it in the workout.
Thoracic rotation is key for bent press — if your T-spine is locked, the bent press path gets weird.
This flows into the KB session directly — no need for a separate warmup block.
